title: SummaryAgent
description: Report produced by `agent-summarizer` for a single `agent` node. Extends `report-base.schema.json`. Stability: experimental.

whatItDoes.description: One-sentence summary of the agent's role. REQUIRED.

whenToUse.description: Situations or triggers where this agent should be selected over alternatives.

capabilities.description: Distinct things the agent can do, as inferred from the body and declared tools.

toolsObserved.description: Tool names the summarizer observed referenced in the body. MAY differ from `metadata.tools` / frontmatter.tools; rules can emit drift issues.

interactionStyle.description: Free-form: autonomous vs interactive, synchronous vs queued, reporting style.
